name: fix: Sửa bug carousel không giữ đúng scale sau auto-rotate

tasks.name: Fix carousel setInterval callback: disable transition → reorder DOM → force reflow → apply sizes → re-enable transition
tasks.acceptance: open index2.html in browser → wait 15s (3 rotations) → DevTools Console: document.querySelectorAll('#phone-carousel .phone-item').forEach((p,i) => { const img=p.querySelector('img'); console.log(`Phone ${i}: transform=${img.style.transform}, opacity=${img.style.opacity}`) }) → Phone 0: scale(0.85), 0.7 | Phone 1: scale(1.2), 1 | Phone 2: scale(0.85), 0.7
